text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Whoa! That Nishino Flower is quick!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I was watching with bated breath, worried that
she'd be crushed by the elite competition...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
But I get why she was fast-tracked now. She
seems to have an abundance of natural talent!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Hm? Hold on a sec...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: ...Is it just me, or is she really struggling?

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text: Flower?! Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Mom and Dad?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You really came... all the way to Sapporo... to watch me... Huff!

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Flower! Take some deep breaths, dear. That'll
help you! Right, honey?!

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text: U-um, I, uh... T-Trainer, some assistance, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Nishino Flower in a state of total exhaustion
and her parents sick with worry, it takes me a few
minutes to calm the situation.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sorry for making you worry... I'm fine now.

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? No pain in your chest or anywhere
else? You're not injured, are you?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Mom, please calm down! I'm not hurt.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I was just a little tired is all.

text_block_list.name: Flower's Father
text_block_list.text:
Well, it sure didn't look like you were just "a
little" tired to us. Competing in races might be
too hard on you after all.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
All the other Umamusume are exhausted after
racing too! Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, her fatigue is far worse than that of the
other racers. Her still-growing body puts her at a
disadvantage, and that won't change anytime
soon...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, I don't want to worry her parents even
more. As long as I provide the right care, this
shouldn't be a major issue.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
See? It's normal. But everyone goes out there and
runs with all they have.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So please don't worry so much. I promise I'll get
plenty of rest!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But more importantly, it's official now! I made my
race debut! I want to see smiles on your faces.

text_block_list.name: Flower's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm sorry. You're right... Congratulations,
Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm going to go get changed... Just wait
here until I'm done.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (I sure made everyone worry...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Maybe I'm still not cut out for this yet. I'll train
hard and build up more physical endurance.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(But I wonder if that will be enough. If I'm going
to get people to acknowledge Trainer...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I'll have to do something major—like win a big
race... I bet that'll drive away all those worries!)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um... So what was it that we needed to decide
on?
choice_data_list: Let's think about your next race goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Based on what I saw of her running today, I think
she'd perform very well in the junior-year G1
races. The thing is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering how exhausted she was after today's
race, steady physical conditioning might be the
way to go. With that in mind...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'd like to compete in a G1 race!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I understand what it means to run in a G1 race.
Even the most talented of the older students only
have a slim chance of victory...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Even so... I want to give it a try. You might think
it's too soon, but I—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower searches for the right words.
However, her determination comes through loud
and clear. In that case, I need to support her!
choice_data_list: All right! A G1 race it is!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'll do my very best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering the length of the junior G1 races,
perhaps a mile race like the Asahi Hai Futurity
Stakes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Or the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies would be the best
place for Nishino Flower to start.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, let me see... I'd like to enter the Hanshin
Juvenile Fillies.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It's a race that many of the wonderful, older
Umamusume like Gold City have competed in.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I've always dreamed about running in it, just like
they did!
choice_data_list:
Then we'll prepare for the Hanshin Juvenile
Fillies!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'll put my all into this!
choice_data_list: (I've got to work even harder too.)
(I've got to work even harder too.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her so worn out after the race really
caught me off guard. I can't let her see me like
that ever again, so I need to be better prepared.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: All right. Time to plant lots of flowers!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oho? Someone's a real go-getter.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hello, Sky! Just woke up from a nap?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Mm-hmm, yeah. More importantly...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Congrats on your debut. Let me reward that great
effort in an exclusively Sei way: a round of
applause.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Seiun Sky's a bit mysterious, but she's also very
kind and always looks out for me.)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Now, a question for the Umamusume of the hour!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What are you doing, exactly? You've been
digging in the dirt like there's no tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I sure am. This is all to make a new flower
bed.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...But, um, the reason I'm making it is a secret!
So... ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha—my lips are sealed. But will you let me in
on it at least?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...Well, I want to craft this flower bed into a
message for my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Every time I run in a race, I'll add more flowers.
And once it's full of beautiful blossoms, it'll be
time to show it off.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I hope it'll make Trainer happy... I just really want
to give them more confidence!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: And when that day comes...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I want to tell Trainer it's thanks to the effort we
put in together that there are so many flowers
blossoming here.)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ohh, now you got me feeling jelly.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nothin' at all. Anyhoo, you'd better enter plenty
of races, then.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Good answer. Now, I think I'll play in the dirt for a
bit too.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: A-are you sure? Your uniform will get dirty!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm always covered in grass anyway... Plus, I
can always use one of my exclusive life hacks.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
If I show up in front of King all dirty, she'll clean
me up right away. She gives me a good scolding,
too, but no biggie!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Y-you don't have to go that far! I'll wash your
uniform for you!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmm, maybe I'll tidy up this spot.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...That'd be a great help, Sky! ♪
